metadata.description: Claude plugin marketplace for commonly used tools at Sequence and a core skills library for Claude Code.

plugins.name: sequence
plugins.description: Core skills library for Claude Code: Planning, code analysis, architecture, implementation, TDD, testing, documentation, and more.

plugins.name: sequence-linear
plugins.description: Set up MCP server to connect to Linear API for issue tracking and project management.

plugins.name: sequence-notion
plugins.description: Set up MCP server to connect to Notion API for searching knowledge base and managing pages.

plugins.name: sequence-logs
plugins.description: Query GCP Cloud Logging across dev, sandbox, and production environments using native filter syntax.

plugins.name: sequence-database
plugins.description: Query AlloyDB Read Replica instance across dev, sandbox, and production environments using PSQL read queries.
